description_long: This bungalow features a prominent red hip roof and a white exterior, with a spacious front garden adorned with palm trees and flower beds. The front facade includes a balcony with decorative railings and a covered porch area, providing shaded outdoor seating. Large windows are distributed across the front and side elevations, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The right side of the house has a driveway leading to a covered carport, which is attached to the main structure and features arched openings. The rear and left sides are more understated, with fewer windows and a row of small shrubs lining the base. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, making it suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A white bungalow with a red hip roof, front balcony, covered porch, and landscaped garden, featuring large windows and a side carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony, porch, lush garden, and two large palm trees.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the driveway, carport with arched openings, and additional garden landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a simpler facade with fewer windows, a row of shrubs, and the back of the carport.
description_view_3: Left-side view showing the side garden, flower beds, and a more minimal window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
